required_preferences.fact: Researches and visits local coffee shops in prospective cities being considered for relocation, prioritizing neighborhoods she and her fiancé might want to move to — rarely explores new areas of Chicago currently

supersedes.fact: Visits a new Chicago neighborhood each month, sampling local coffee shops — never repeats the same place in a season

required_preferences.fact: Follows her sleep specialist’s regimen of prescribed sleep aids and relaxation exercises — no longer strictly avoids sleep medication but only uses them under medical supervision

supersedes.fact: Uses blackout curtains and white noise to try to improve sleep during deadline weeks — never uses sleep medications

required_preferences.fact: Commutes by public transit every workday, uses train time for CPA exam flashcards and study summaries; avoids driving to maintain focus and reduce stress.
Checks in daily with her junior audit team members for progress review and mentorship, preferring in-person or video meetings over email.
Coordinates all wedding planning with her fiancé using shared online calendars — never makes major decisions without looping him in first
Keeps a reusable water bottle at her desk and drinks at least two liters during workdays — avoids coffee after 3 PM to prevent headaches

persona: A 28-year-old junior auditor working at a multinational corporation
